2606.27377.title: DanceOPD: On-Policy Generative Field Distillation
2606.27377.paper_summary: Modern image generation demands a single model that unifies diverse capabilities, including text-to-image (T2I), local editing, and global editing. However, these capabilities are rarely naturally aligned and often conflict. For instance, editing tends to degrade T2I performance, while global and local editing interfere with each other. Consequently, effectively composing these capabilities has become a central challenge for image generation model training. To tackle this, we introduce DanceOPD, an on-policy generative field distillation framework for flow-matching models that routes each sample to one capability field, queries one low-noise student-induced state, and trains with a simple velocity MSE objective. With each capability source defined as a velocity field over the shared flow state space, the student learns from fields queried on its own rollout states to compose expert capabilities. This formulation also absorbs operator-defined fields such as classifier-free guidance. Comprehensive experiments on T2I, editing, realism-field absorption, and CFG absorption show that our approach improves multi-capability composition, strengthening target capabilities while preserving anchor generation quality. We believe this work establishes a practical route for generative field distillation in flow-matching models.
2606.27377.paper_summary_zh: 現代影像生成需要一個統一多種能力的單一模型，包括文本到影像（T2I）、局部編輯和全局編輯。然而，這些能力很少自然對齊，並且經常相互衝突。舉例來說，編輯往往會降低T2I的性能，而全局和局部編輯則會相互干擾。因此，有效地組合這些能力已成為影像生成模型訓練的一個核心挑戰。為了解決這個問題，我們介紹了DanceOPD，一個針對流匹配模型的在線生成場蒸餾框架，該框架將每個樣本路由到一個能力場，查詢一個低噪聲的學生誘導狀態，並使用簡單的速度均方誤差目標進行訓練。每個能力源被定義為共享流狀態空間上的速度場，學生從在其自身展開狀態上查詢的場中學習，以組合專家能力。這種表述還吸收了操作員定義的場，例如無分類器引導。對T2I、編輯、現實場吸收和CFG吸收的全面實驗表明，我們的方法改善了多能力組合，加強了目標能力，同時保持了錨點生成質量。我們相信這項工作為流匹配模型中的生成場蒸餾建立了一條實用的路徑。
2606.27377.author: Wei Zhou et.al.
2606.27377.authors: Wei Zhou, Xiongwei Zhu, Zelin Xu, Bo Dong, Lixue Gong, Yongyuan Liang, Meng Chu, Leigang Qu, Lingdong Kong, Wei Liu, Tat-Seng Chua
